entries.name: LinkedIn Postpilot
entries.description: Builds psychologically precise, deeply human LinkedIn posts through a structured 13-step input and a high-control generation engine

entries.name: BAZ EU AI Check Medical
entries.description: Evaluates AI risk exposure for medical practices based on 13 structured questions aligned with the EU AI Act, focusing on IP leakage, patient data protection, and real-world operational risks, and generates a professional, medically contextualized risk report

entries.name: LCIS Engine
entries.description: Builds a LinkedIn Collective Intelligence Score and generates a structured multi-part B2B report

entries.name: KSON Engine
entries.description: Generates a deep 13-vector energy profile using deterministic user input and produces a multi-output heavy expansion personality report
